title: Question about FitDiagnostics and scan for resonance width

posts.name: Alexandre Nikitenko
posts.text:
Dear experts,
in my signal model I have as parameters signal strength (r), width and mass.
I would like to evaluate width and its uncertainties using FitDiagnostics since
errors are assymetrical for sure. I use
combine -M FitDiagnostics 2017UL_dimuon_SR1.txt --robustFit=1 --rMin 0 --rMax 100 --redefineSignalPOIs width
question is - should I still used rMin and rMax in above command and if yes, what will be the meaning - range of width or range of signal strenght ?
Thanks, Sasha.
